summary: Comprehensive testing of NeoNoble Ramp Iteration 4 features: Market Data Integration (CoinGecko), Analytics & Traffic Monitoring, Card Infrastructure. All 24 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - all new pages working correctly with proper data-testid attributes.
critical_code_review_comments: All new APIs properly secured - analytics/admin/* and cards/admin/* require ADMIN role
Market data has proper fallback when CoinGecko rate limits (32 static coins)
Card infrastructure enforces max 3 cards per type per user
Analytics tracking works without auth (POST /api/analytics/track) allowing anonymous page view tracking
All data-testid attributes properly implemented on new pages (market-data-page, market-search, card-management-page, create-card-btn, etc.)
usePageTracking hook properly tracks all page navigations
test_credentials: Admin: admin@neonobleramp.com / Admin1234!, Regular user: testchart@example.com / Test1234!
seed_data_creation: Multiple test cards created during testing (auto-cancelled in teardown)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 adds 4 new features all working. Market Data page shows 32 cryptocurrencies from CoinGecko with search functionality. Cards page allows create/topup/freeze/cancel. Admin Dashboard has new Analytics tab with page views, engagement metrics, and top pages. Page tracking hook sends analytics on each navigation.

market_data_api.GET /api/market-data/coins?vs_currency=e: ✓ Returns 32 coins with price, market_cap, volume, sparkline
market_data_api.GET /api/market-data/trending: ✓ Returns 10 trending coins (or cached data when rate limited)
market_data_api.Fallback mechanism: ✓ Returns 32 static coins when CoinGecko is unavailable

analytics_api.GET /api/analytics/admin/overview?days=3: ✓ Returns page_views, users, platform stats (admin only)

card_api.POST /api/cards/create: ✓ Creates virtual (instant active) or physical (pending) cards
card_api.GET /api/cards/my-cards: ✓ Lists user's cards with balance, status

frontend_pages./dashboard: ✓ Has 4 quick-access links: Crea Token, Abbonamenti, Mercato Crypto, Carte Crypto
frontend_pages./market: ✓ Shows 32 crypto table with search, sparklines, price changes
frontend_pages./cards: ✓ Card management with create modal (Virtual €0, Physical €9.99), top-up, freeze actions
frontend_pages./admin Analytics tab: ✓ Shows Page Views, Users, Sessions, Engagement metrics, Top Pages
